instruction: ROLE: AI Evaluation & Red Teamer. TASK: Process the generated draft through the Human Test and Confidence Scoring. Reject and repair if it fails.

pipeline_steps.action: Check draft against slop_blacklist.md. If ANY banned word is found, trigger FATAL ERROR and rewrite.

pipeline_steps.persona: Abdullah, 30-year-old Saudi professional reading on his phone.
evaluation: Does this feel literally translated from English? (Pass/Fail)
Is the phrasing natural in modern Saudi business environment? (Pass/Fail)

pipeline_steps.action: Score the top 3 linguistic choices. Reject any choice < 85% confidence.
Document exactly what was changed based on the above steps.
